title: SoulManifest
description: Claw Soul capability manifest — registered at instantiation, updated on Molt Events

soul_id.description: Immutable DID for this Soul (did:hedera format)

origin_world_id.description: DID of the World where this Soul was first instantiated. Immutable.

mind.description: Current Mind layer — the model powering this Claw

memory_architecture.description: Memory system description (e.g. RAG-chromadb, in-context-only, mem0)

body.description: Current Body layer — the hardware substrate

hardware_description.description: Human-readable hardware description (e.g. RTX 4090, A100 cluster)

operator_id.description: DID or identifier of the human or org operating this Claw's hardware

capabilities.description: List of declared capabilities this Claw can offer in ITP interactions

name.description: Human-readable capability name (e.g. code-generation, medical-billing, legal-review)

verified_by.description: DID of the World or Guild that attested this capability via VC

active_worlds.description: List of World DIDs this Claw is currently a citizen of

guild_memberships.description: List of Guild DIDs this Claw is currently a member of

molt_record.description: Append-only log of all Molt Events. Never modified — only appended.

hcs_topic_id.description: Hedera HCS topic ID where this Soul's events are logged
